Comment (context for translators): Used in input settings when showing bindings for Gamepad (controller)
Used in input settings when showing bindings for Keyboard
Used in input settings when showing bindings for Mouse
Text on a button that would abort some ongoing operation. It is different from "cancel" since something can be cancelled before it starts, but aborting implies that operation has already begun.

Translation: Expeditie geannuleerd. Teamlid {0} overleden voor betreden van the shuttle.

Translation: Expeditie geannuleerd. We zijn te ver van onze bestemming {0}.
Comment (context for translators): {0} will be replaced with a destination name (i.e. planet name)
"About" menu item name. Also could be used as a button label.
"Mods" in this context is game modifications, or expansions.

Translation: Valuta’s kunnen ontgonnen worden na installatie van upgrades op uw Schip Computer of compatibele mijnapparaten. Je kunt ook geld verzamelen via handel in goederen of aandelen.

Comment (context for translators): AI here is short for Artificial Intelligence. Rogue AI is something like Skynet in Terminator movie, or the AI that enslaved humans in The Elysium movie.
Asimov is Isaac Asimov, a famous sci-fi writer who created the "three laws of robotics"
This is past tense of verb "to breach", meaning: make a gap in and break through (a wall, barrier, or defence).

Translation: Geënterd worden door overvallers met een Breukcapsule
Comment (context for translators): "boarded" as in "the act of passengers and crew getting aboard a ship or aircraft". Raiders are a pirates, "Breach Capsule" is a small pirate space ship that attaches to your ship and breaches through the hull to attack you.
"joy ride" is an English idiom for "a fast and dangerous ride in a stolen vehicle."

Translation: Laat een Kat op een Poetsrobot rijden
Comment (context for translators): There are viral videos on youtube showing cats riding roombas (cleaning robots), example: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SajTWY9a0e0

Translation: Maak een kolonie op een bewoonbare planeet

Comment (context for translators): this is a reference to "The Terminator" movie. Scene: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tYc2jQaM8gM
"lose" here means getting your ship computer destroyed

Translation: Laat een Crawler zich vasthechten aan een menselijke kolonist

Installeer een Starcreds mijnuitbreiding in uw Scheepscomputer

Comment (context for translators): this refers to finally discovering a terraformable planet after a long search

Laat Crawler groeien in een kolonist

Comment (context for translators): short for "all in one piece" idiom, which means "Uninjured or unharmed; fully intact.". Examples of idiom use: We are lucky to have walked away from that car accident all in one piece. I made sure to pack the heirloom carefully so that it would still be all in one piece when it reached my daughter.

Translation: Verbind de secties van het vernielde schip tot één stuk
Verkkop een aandeel met $100K verlies op de Beurs
Creëer een atmosfeer op een planeet
Creëer een biosfeer op een planeet
Creëer oceanen en rivieren op een planeet
Creëer terrein en continenten op een planeet

Comment (context for translators): this is a name for a fictional device that allows ripping the fabric of space-time and traveling though a tunnel between two black holes. "Void" here is as in "emptiness, empty space"

Translation: Verenig twee secties van het schip

Comment (context for translators): This is about the worker, as in "worker is moving to position"
This is about the worker, as in "worker is moving to position"
This is about the worker, as in "worker is moving to position"

Translation: Wezen redden uit de open ruimte

Comment (context for translators): Verb, when someone is expressing anger, etc
Opposite of Inactive or Disabled. Appears on device buttons that can switch the state, or on labels that display that device is active (operational, running)

Translation:
Het totale aantal actieve taken is gelimiteerd door het Gebeugen. Bouw nieuwe Geheugen Modules om de limiet te verhogen.

Van zodra de limiet bereikt is kun je geen nieuwe manuele taken maken.
Vliegend wezen faalde in een pad naar de bestemming. Controleer of alle deuren aangesloten zijn op het net en niet afgesloten, of dat de werker niet door muren buitengesloten is.
Grondwezen faalde in een pad naar de bestemming. Controleer of alle deuren aangesloten zijn op het net en niet afgesloten, of dat de werker niet door muren buitengesloten is.
Voor deze taak is vliegen vereist, maar er zijn geen werknemers met vliegvaardigheden.
De werker had 0 prioriteit voor dit type van taak
De werker die in staat is om deze taak uit te voeren, heeft geen veilige condities op de werkplek. Waarschijnljk kan enkel een mens dit bouwen.

Comment (context for translators): For now only used in switching between "Advanced" and "Basic" life support system function
{0} is planet name, {1} is a number (of days), {2} is a number (of colonists)
When you open "airtightness" overlay, hovering any location with the mouse will show a tooltip showing "Airtightness at [123:12]: 99%". {0} variable is coordinate, {1} is percentage.
Used in stock market history range choice (1 day, 1 week, 1 month, 1 year, all time)
Used in showing mood boost reason for introverted people when they are alone, not in a crowd
For video setting that controls how much ambient light will there be, i.e. how dark things will get if there are no lamps installed. Last change was "Ambient Color" => "Ambient Light"
Ambient light option when everything will be very bright
Darkest ambient light option, that will keep things very dark unless there are light sources
Somewhat dark ambient light option that still has good visibility
Medium ambient light option, between bright and dark
{0} will be replaced with who is arriving (i.e Arriving: Ore trader). For now only used for notifying about arriving merchants.

1. This is a text in UI of the Crafting Station/Assembler/Fabricator.
It combined with the name of the device which is produced right now (like "Assembling Microchip")
2. This is a tooltip text, appearing when you hover a mouse over Crafting Station/Assembler/Fabricator.
It combined with the state of production process in percents (like "Assembling 85%")
For showing what gender the being is attracted to (i.e. "Attracted To -> Female")

Translation: Pas de stilteperiode tussen muzieknummers aan.

Comment (context for translators): short for "Automatic", could be used on a narrow button that toggles between automatic and some other (i.e. manual) setting

Translation: Indien Auto Proper geactiveerd is, zullen werkers dit apparaat automatisch poetsen als het vuild wordt.
Automatisch bewaren bij verlaten van spel

Comment (context for translators): Tells how many items of that type are owned by the player. {0} is a number
Opposite of "Advanced". For now only used in life support option choice (Advanced / Basic)
The amount of electricity the battery draws when charging (i.e. 50kW)
The amount of electricity the battery can produce when discharging (i.e. 100kW)

Translation: Tijd tot volledige ontlading vanaf de huidige lading bij een maximale ontladingssnelheid van {0}

Comment (context for translators): Used to show result of "walkability" check for a selected being. {0} will be the name, {1} will be a coordinate. (John can go to [12:13])
Just like above, but when the walk is not possible (John cannot go to [12:13])
{0} will be damage type, i.e. "Took Cold Damage"
For a tooltip that shows if selected location is safe to be in. {0} is name, {1} is coordinate. Example: "John thinks [123:324] is safe"
For a tooltip that shows if selected location is not safe to be in. {0} is name, {1} is coordinate. Example: "John thinks [123:324] is not safe!"

Translation: Een wendbare vliegende drone die geschikt is voor eenvoudige transport- en onderhoudstaken.

Een klein, gedomesticeerd, vleesetend zoogdier met een zachte vacht, een korte snuit en intrekbare klauwen. Het wordt veel gehouden als huisdier of voor het vangen van muizen, en er zijn veel rassen ontwikkeld.
Een slimme robotstofzuiger met maar één taak: de vloeren schoonmaken.

Drones zijn snel en kunnen in open ruimtes vliegen. Ze kunnen niet veel gewicht dragen en zijn niet in staat tot geavanceerde taken. Ze hebben een laadstation nodig om op te laden. Ze worden traag en inefficiënt wanneer de energie bijna op is. Je kunt ze maken met een Assemblagemachine.
Een gedomesticeerd vleesetend zoogdier dat doorgaans een lange snuit, een scherp reukvermogen, niet-intrekbare klauwen en een blaffende, huilende of jammerende stem heeft.

Comment (context for translators): Displayed in event panel when there is a door that is blocked by some device, preventing the door from being used
One of the statistics for reasons why worker did not do some tasks. This is for types of tasks where worker needs are evaluated. I.e. robot did not recharge because the battery was full -> no need
Action verb. Used on a button that brews a drink (coffee, beer, etc). Should be short if possible
Displayed in a tooltip of a machine that brews drinks. Shows what exactly is brewing. {0} will be the drink name, i.e. "Brewing: Coffee"
Label of the progress bar that shows how long a device (i.e. a Force Field) will have to charge to get to 100%
Text on a button that toggles display of a chart (i.e. electricity graph). Should be short if possible.
{0} will be the target (person) name (i.e. "Chasing John")
A robot that cleans floors
Displayed when a person or robot is cleaning floors (action).
Name of a human trait, which makes someone become obsessive about cleaning. OCD is short for Obsessive Compulsive Disorder.

A label displayed when a change in keyboard or controller bindings is being initiated. You want to rebind a shortcut to a different key, or change the controller stick that handles camera pan, you click on existing binding and this message is displayed while the game waits for you to press a button or move a stick, etc. It doesn't say "Press a button" because it may not always be a button (gamepad stick is a small joystick, etc)
A label for the progress bar of a cloning device. {0} is what the device is currently cloning. I.e. "Cloning: Human"

Translation: Je kunt een Kloon Capsule bouwen en nieuwe kolonisten laten groeien vanuit ruwe materialen, zoals Proteïnen en Water. Je kunt zelfs kiezen welke soorten je wilt laten groeien. Mensen, dieren en zelfs Crawlers. Als het organisch is, kun je het klonen.

Het leven in de ruimte is wreed en de dood is vaak onvermijdelijk. Je kolonie zal echter vanzelf regenereren doordat nieuwe kolonisten ontwaken uit hun cryoslaap in de Stasis Kamers of zich op andere manieren bij je kolonie voegen.

Je kunt de doodsoorzaak vaststellen door een dood wezen te selecteren en de informatie in het informatiepaneel te bekijken.

Dode kolonisten kunnen worden verwerkt in de Nutriënt Trekker, waardoor essentiële materialen worden verkregen die nodig zijn voor het overleven van de levenden.

Soms kunnen piraten uw kolonie aanvallen. In een dergelijk evenement zal uw kolonie in een gevechtsstatus wisselen. Gebruik het {0} overzicht om de situatie te evalueren.

Versterk uw kolonie tegen deze invallen met wapen en defensieve apparaten.
Overvallers proberen soms je waardevolle spullen te stelen en meenemen naar hun vluchtvoertuig. In sommige gevallen kunnen ze zelfs een van je shuttles stelen.

Comment (context for translators): empty on purpose, codex linked to el.production.priority.desc

Translation:
Zuurstof is een essentieel gas voor het voortbestaan van biologische wezens. Uitwisseling van zuurstof gebeurt voortdurend tussen naburige tegels, afhankelijk van hun niveau van Luchtdichtheid. Als een omgeving blootgesteld staat aan Ruimte zal zuurstof weglekken. Extreme hitte in combinatie met zuurstof zal aanleiding geven tot vuur.


Controleer {0} en {1} schermen of druk {2} en beweeg de muisaanwijzer over de omgevingen om de zuurstofniveau’s en luchtdichtheden te zien.

Sommige grondstoffen kunnen worden verwerkt tot meer verfijnde grondstoffen die later kunnen worden gebruikt als ingrediënten voor het maken van voorwerpen of voor andere doeleinden. Verwerking is meestal nodig voor ruwe grondstoffen zoals ertsen of ruwe olie.

Voor verwerking is een geschikte faciliteit nodig (bijvoorbeeld een oven voor ertsen). Raadpleeg de Codex-vermeldingen voor verschillende grondstoffen om te achterhalen welk type verwerkingsfaciliteit compatibel is.

Je kunt dode wezens verwerken in een Nutriënt Extractor en dode robots en drones in een demontagemachine.

Sommige grondstoffen leveren meerdere of variabele materialen op na verwerking. Het verwerken van gesteente in een slijpmachine kan een aantal verschillende materialen opleveren. Raadpleeg de Codex-vermeldingen van elk materiaal voor meer informatie.

Comment (context for translators): For showing a combat state when a Crawler is attached to a human's face (like a face hugger)
A label displayed in the menu when you have a disconnected device that needs fuel. You cannot refuel it while it is disconnected, so you have to "connect to refuel"
For a label of a text area where player has to enter the "content" of some message
For a label before a list of items that are inside some container
A device type, noun. Opposite of "Heater". Device that cools the area down, reduces temperature.

Most "copy.config.X" keys are used in combination with "copy.config.of" key (which is "Copy Config: {0}"). In this case the copy config action target is a cleanable device (i.e. a toilet or a solar panel). The value of this translation will be placed into {0} variable of "copy.config.of", so in this case it will become "Copy Config: Cleanable". This text will be displayed on a button that copies the configuration of the cleanable device and then lets you paste it onto other devices of same type.

This one is like "copy.config.cleanable" but the target device is a door. The door lock state can be "Locked" or "Unlocked", so when you get a menu of the door options, there will be a button saying "Copy Config: Lock State". You can then paste the lock state on other doors that can be locked or unlocked.
A header before list of names of people who have to be credited for doing something (i.e. translating the game). Used in Main Menu > About > Credits, or when the game end screen is displayed.

Translation: Toont hoe stabiel de levensonderhoudsystemen zijn. Onstabiele cryokamers zullen kolonisten regelmatiger uitwerken en met meer ernstige condities. Om de stabiliteit te verhogen zet Levensonderhoud van basis naar geavanceerd. Het zal meer energie verbruiken, maar de stabiliteit zal langzaam verbeteren.

Comment (context for translators): There is a device called "Stasis Array" that has multiple "chambers" where people can get frozen for long term sleep. "Used Chambers" is a label before the number telling how many of those chambers are currently occupied.

Translation: Toont het aantal Statis Kamers momenteel bezet door levende wezens. Kamers kunnen mensen of dieren bevatten.

Comment (context for translators): Cutoff refers to audio low-pass filter frequency: In a lowpass filter, the higher the cutoff frequency is set, the higher the frequencies of signals that are allowed to pass. Ambience in this case is sounds coming from various devices, like machines or engines humming. The context for "Zoom Cutoff for Ambience" - it is used as a label for a checkbox in audio settings. If checked, when camera is zooming, ambience audio gets the cutoff (muffled sound) effect when camera distance changes.

Translation: {0} is in een status dat afbreken niet toelaat. Gelieve later opnieuw te proberen.

Comment (context for translators): demand.type.X keys are for options used in crafting devices to select how many items do we want to produce. "Produce Custom Amount" does what demand.type.Custom.tip says - the device will produce X items and stop. This configuration option is per device, unlike "Target Global Inventory" it will calculate how many items that particular device has produced.

like demand.type.Custom, but instead of a custom amount for a particular crafting device, it will track your inventory, so if you have 3 devices that produce "copper wire", and you set all of those devices to "Target Global Inventory" of 10 items, all the devices will stop producing new "copper wire" after you have a total of 10.
like demant.type.Custom, but it does not let you choose the amount, it will stop after producing one item
like demand.type.Custom, but it does not let you choose the amount, it will keep producing the copies of the item forever (or until you change the configuration)

Translation:
Demo Modus AAN
(Zet uit met: Ctrl + F9)

Comment (context for translators): Example: "Furnace (Iron) is idle"

shows up in the list of reasons why someone did not perform a task. "Different section" in this context means that the worker was in section A, while task was in section B. Different sections can only be reached by flying, so worker that will not do the task for this reason will almost always be someone who is incapable of flying
Shows up in the list of game difficulty levels. Balanced is like "medium difficulty"
Shows up in the list of game difficulty levels. Challenging is like "hard difficulty"
Shows up in the list of game difficulty levels. Relaxing is like "easy difficulty"
A text on a button that enables "direct control" of a robot. "Direct control" allows issuing orders directly to the selected robot. Otherwise robots make choices and perform actions on their own.

Noun. direction.X keys are used on buttons that allow you to select your space ship's "forward direction". It tells which way the ship's front is facing. Engines will be on the opposite direction, etc.

Decals in game development are textures that are placed on top of other textures to add various marks (bullet damage, blood, dirt, etc). In this case it is for menu item that allows spawning dirt on the floor.

A label displayed next to the time left for a force field device to be activated (because it's battery is discharging, after some time it will auto-deactivate and will have to recharge). See "charge.time.left" key for more context.
Verb. Displayed on an action button that tells a robot to return to a docking station.
Adjective. Displayed on a button that opens a submenu that contains robot's docking status and controls
Robot state, denoting that robot is currently inside it's designated docking station
Robot state, denoting that robot is currently trying to reach it's docking station

This is a tooltip/balloon text, appearing when you hover cursor over the "Max Production" string in the Electric Grid Overlay (section Details)
It means - the value (amount of production power) does not include electric power which produced by Batteries.
A warning for input key binding settings. Displayed if the same button is bound to execute more than one action (which is bad).

Displayed in the event list. This text is displayed for the whole duration of the dust storm, so the player can see that the dust storm did not go away yet. Should not be much longer than the English translation.

Translation: Onderzoek “Economie” is nodig voor deze functionaliteit.

Comment (context for translators): Displayed in a tooltip when dragging a connector
Displayed in a tooltip near mouse cursor when trying to drag and create a connection from electrical connector that has no available connection slots

Displayed in a tooltip when trying to drag an electrical connection from a connector that is not part of Ship Computer's electric grid. Player cannot control devices that are no connected to Ship Computer though a network.
Displayed in a tooltip when trying to drag an electrical connection to a point where the connector cannot reach it
Displayed in a tooltip when tryng to connect to a device that is damaged too much
Displayed when trying to connect to a device that has not been built yet
Displayed in a tooltip when trying to connect a device that does not require electricity
Displayed in a tooltip when trying to connect two devices directly (which is not allowed, one of the devices must be a connector)
A mode for the Emergency Siren device. When the mode is "Automatic", the siren will sound on it's own when emergency happens.
A mode for the Emergency Siren device. When the mode is "Manual", the siren will only sound when the player turns it on.

A label for list of things a person is attached to. As in "Emotional attachments". Someone can be attached to another person (i.e. they are friends, or in love), a thing (i.e. their favorite chair near a table, their own bed), or a substance (addiction to coffee). When the subject of this attachment is lost, the person will feel bad about it.

Adjective. Used in several places where there is supposed to be a list of items, but there is nothing to show. For example if a storage unit does not have any contents, and you try to see the list of contents, it will show this "Empty" text

Translation: Indien Gevechten uitgeschakeld is, zal het spel volledig vredevol worden. Natuurlijke fenomenen zoals meteoorinslagen kunnen nog steeds gebeuren.

Comment (context for translators): Displayed in tooltip when you hover an old event notification. {0} will be used in conjunction of "time.ago" translation. Example: "Ended 5 hours ago"
{0} will show the count of devices. Switched off is as in "turned off" or "offline", i.e. "Switched Off [12]"
This is used in a label that shows how powerful the ship engines are when you combine their output. "Push" here is as in "Force" or "Power", or "Propulsion amount".
Used in an action button that would start an expedition to explore a planet
Expedition state label. Showed when expedition members are on their way to the Shuttle
Used in an action button when you are flying in the galaxy and want to enter a particular star system. It will then shift from galaxy view to star system view.
May be used if we will have more than one universe (multiverse), this would change the current universe.
{0} will be replaced with a keyboard button image showing ESC button. You can treat it as non essential for the translation.
{0} will be time (i.e. 1 day 4 hours), {1} will be power output (i.e. 120kW). Example: "Estimated time left: 2 hours at 24kW"
ETA is short for "Estimated Time of Arrival"
when a pressurized airlock is exposed to open space, someone can get "sucked out" (vented) into open space
A longer description of "Vented Into Space" event. {0} will be replaced by a name

Used for task audit. Label for a worker who has evaluated (considered taking) a task. Displayed in a list next to "Times Evaluated" (how many times someone tried to take this task) and "Last Evaluation Time" (when did anyone try to take this task).
{0} is the name of the worker
{0} is species, {1} is full name. {2} is age (number), {3} is damage type. Example: "Human John died at age 39. Cause of Death: Suffocation"
{0} will be the name of the worker

Translation: Ik heb een ongeïdentificeerd object gevonden dat op een ei lijkt. Wat kan er in zitten?
Verschillende levensvormen ontdekt. Opletten is het advies.
Er is iets uit het ei gekomen
Er was een kortsluiting tijdens het aansluiten van {0}

Comment (context for translators): {0} is the device name, {1} is an event like in translation of "evt.end.fire" or "evt.end.explosion". Example: "Matter Reactor had a heavy malfunction that ended with explosion"

Translation: Er komt een meteorenregen aan. Dit is een noodsituatie!
We bevinden ons in een zone waar de kans groot is dat we geraakt worden door een micrometeoriet die met bijna de lichtsnelheid vliegt. Wees voorzichtig!
Te ver om terug te keren

Comment (context for translators): {0} will be the shuttle name
{0} will be the shuttle name, {1} will be planet name or some expedition target name (i.e. abandoned ship name)

Translation: Gebruik dit rapport om een bewaard spel en spel logs door te sturen naar de ontwikkelaar.
Gebruik dit rapport om een bewaard spel en spel logs door te sturen naar de ontwikkelaar.

Comment (context for translators): Label for a positive mood bonus for someone who just had a shower

Translation: Kans om op te branden bij schade

Comment (context for translators): {0} is location (i.e. some planet name), or a coordinate, (i.e. "123:125"). {1} is time (i.e. 2 days 3 hours). Example: "We have arrived at Jupiter. Journey took 8 days 1 hour"
{0} is a number. Last change added "abandon" to the list of actions.

Translation: Vlucht onmogelijk. Je hebt geen motoren die in staat zijn de vereiste afstand te overbruggen. Onderzoek en bouw meer geavanceerde motoren.
Koers gezet naar {0}. Afstand: {1}. Je zal geïnformeerd worden bij aankomst.
Brug Bediening is niet geconnecteerd. Motoren zullen niet functioneren.

Comment (context for translators): Used in "Merchant Beacon" device in a short label to show that a merchant of the seeked type was found.
{0} will be some material type, i.e. "Coal" or "Petrol". Note for devs: fuel.type won't be found in code, because it is "${purpose}.type" where purpose is "fuel".
{0} will be some material type, i.e. "Coal" or "Petrol"
Refers to a plant or anything that could grow in soil (trees, mushrooms, etc)

Translation: Ben je zeker dat je dit bewaard spel wil verwijderen? Deze actie kan niet ongedaan gemaakt worden.
“Vernield” is het hoofdscenario. Als je wilt spelen zoals voorzien, kies “Permadeath” in de instellingen.

Comment (context for translators): {0} will be a number (1 or greater)
{0} will be the version number, i.e. "v0.6.154"

Version: visit nearby planets and mine some raw materials first.

Translation: We hebben minstens één Reparatiestation nodig voor onze robots zodat ze aan zelfonderhoud kunnen doen.
Warmte wordt enkel geproduceerd als het apparaat actief is (verbruiken of genereren van elektriciteit). Houd dit apparaat buiten, of bouw eventueel Koelcellen om de warmte af te voeren.

Comment (context for translators): Last update mentioned trade in the stock market
It will appear on a button that shows a popup which explains how to launch a space shuttle expedition
Label for a checkbox that allows the player to select if they want to include the game save file with their bug report
Used in displaying time estimate when something would take forever to execute. Example: research time estimate when there is 0kW of energy output shows a tooltip: "ETA: Infinity @0kW"
Used as a label before gamepad key bindings that emulate mouse motion and clicks. Basically for mouse controls that are done using the gamepad.
Label for key binding, for a button that increases the game clock speed (makes time flow faster)
Label for key binding, for a button that decreases the game clock speed (makes time flow slower)

Label for key binding that toggles in-game console on and off. You can type various commands in that console, it is for more technical players or those who want to create mods (modifications) for the game.
as in "this cat is being petted right now"

job.type.X translations are displayed in job type priority controls (in this case there would be "Animals" priority where you can set it from 0 to 9). The same translation is also displayed in the tooltip of a task (job) of this type. Example: you hover the mouse cursor over someone who is training a dog and see a tooltip: "Task [Animals]: Train a dog".
Used on a button that forces a door to remain open
Label for data about when a pet was petted by someone. Will look like "Last petted by John 2 hours ago". {0} is name, {1} is "time ago"
Noun. Used on a button that opens light source (i.e. lamp) controls, like color, brightness, etc.
verb, as in "create a link"
Action verb for a button that locks the door
Label for a state that shows that door is locked
A header for game story - a history of everything that happened to the player from the beginning of the game. This story can be exported and shared, etc.
This is used to indicate that something that belongs to your base is stolen or destroyed. For example a space shuttle that flew on an expedition and got destroyed would have "lost" marker in it's UI.

Translation: Klik op een taak, of sleep een venster over de taken die je wenst te annuleren.

Comment (context for translators): Displayed in a label when the player is buying a stock in the Stock Market. {0} is the stock name. Example: "Buying: Microsoft"

Translation: Hoogste prijs ooit geregistreerd voor dit element.
Laagste prijs ooit geregistreerd voor dit element.

Comment (context for translators): order, as in "Take a meal and go eat it"
Must be short, Atmosphere is too long to fit in the button. Can be longer if two short words, so it can break by space in two lines.

Translation: Meubilair om te slapen of rusten

Comment (context for translators): Must be a short word or two short words, as it has little space horizontally but can wrap vertically. 'Communications' is too long.
best to keep it short, as it cannot fit horizontally if too long

Translation: Gebruik TAB om te zoeken naar elementen in dit menu
